title: SSC CGL 2024 Recruitment - Apply Online for 17727 Posts
short_info: Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the notification for Combined Graduate Level (CGL) Examination 2024. Candidates can apply online for 17727 Group B and Group C posts in various ministries and government departments.
content:
Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has released the SSC CGL 2024 Recruitment Notification for 17727 vacancies. This is one of the biggest government job recruitment drives in India.

### Vacancy Details
- Inspector (Central Excise): 452 posts
- Inspector (Income Tax): 312 posts
- Assistant Section Officer: 389 posts
- Sub-Inspector (CBI): 112 posts
- And many more posts across various departments

### Eligibility
- Age Limit: 18-30 years (varies by post)
- Qualification: Bachelor's Degree from recognized university
- Nationality: Indian citizen

### Important Dates
- Start Date: 24th June 2024
- Last Date: 24th July 2024
- Tier-I Exam: September 2024

### Application Fee
- General/OBC: ₹100
- SC/ST/PWD/Women: Nil

### How to Apply
Visit the official SSC website at ssc.nic.in and complete the online application process.

title: UPSC IAS 2024 - Civil Services Examination Notification
short_info: Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) invites online applications for Civil Services Examination 2024 for IAS, IPS, IFS and other Group A & B services. Total vacancies: 1056.
content:
UPSC Civil Services Examination is one of the most prestigious examinations in India conducted for recruitment to various Civil Services of the Government of India.

### Services Included
- Indian Administrative Service (IAS)
- Indian Police Service (IPS)
- Indian Foreign Service (IFS)
- Indian Revenue Service (IRS)
- And 20+ other services

### Eligibility Criteria
- Age Limit: 21-32 years (relaxation for reserved categories)
- Qualification: Bachelor's Degree in any discipline
- Nationality: Indian (for IAS/IPS), or subject specified for certain services

### Examination Pattern
- Preliminary Examination (Objective type)
- Main Examination (Descriptive type)
- Personality Test/Interview

### Important Dates
- Application Start: 14th February 2024
- Application End: 5th March 2024
- Prelims Exam: 26th May 2024

### Fee
- General/OBC/EWS: ₹100
- SC/ST/PWD: Nil

title: Railway RRB Group D Recruitment 2024 - Apply Online
short_info: Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has announced 108464 vacancies for Group D posts including Track Maintainer, Helper, Assistant, and various Level 1 posts.
content:
Indian Railways, through various Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs), has released a massive recruitment notification for Group D Level 1 posts. This is an excellent opportunity for candidates with minimum educational qualification.

### Post Details
- Track Maintainer Grade IV
- Helper/Assistant in various departments
- Pointsman
- And other Level 1 posts

### Vacancy Distribution
- 108464 posts across all RRBs
- Region-wise allocation available in official notification

### Eligibility
- Age Limit: 18-33 years (age relaxation applicable)
- Qualification: 10th Pass + ITI (NCVT/SCVT) OR 10th Pass + National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) OR 10th Pass + 2 years experience

### Selection Process
- Computer Based Test (CBT)
- Physical Efficiency Test (PET)
- Document Verification
- Medical Examination

### Important Dates
- Online Application: 15th January 2024 to 14th February 2024
- CBT Exam Date: March/April 2024

### Application Fee
- General/OBC/EWS: ₹500 (₹400 refundable after appearing in CBT)
- SC/ST/PWD/Women/Transgender/EBC: ₹250 (₹250 refundable)

title: SSC GD Constable 2024 - Admit Card Released
short_info: Staff Selection Commission has released the SSC GD Constable 2024 Admit Card for Computer Based Examination to be held from 20th February to 30th March 2024.
content:
SSC has released the admit cards for GD Constable Examination 2024. Candidates who applied for 26146 vacancies in CAPF, SSF, Rifleman in Assam Rifles can download their admit cards from regional SSC websites.

### Examination Schedule
- Start Date: 20th February 2024
- End Date: 30th March 2024
- Shift: Multiple shifts per day

### How to Download Admit Card
1. Visit your regional SSC website
2. Click on GD Constable Admit Card link
3. Enter Registration Number/Roll Number and Date of Birth
4. Download and take printout

### Important Instructions
- Carry a printed copy of admit card to exam center
- Bring original photo ID proof (Aadhar/Voter ID/PAN Card/Passport)
- Entry closed 30 minutes before exam time
- Electronic devices banned in exam hall
- Follow dress code specified in admit card

### Exam Pattern
- 100 questions for 200 marks
- Duration: 60 minutes
- Subjects: General Intelligence, General Knowledge, Mathematics, English/Hindi

title: UP Police Constable Result 2024 - Declared
short_info: Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment Board has declared the UP Police Constable Result 2024 for 60244 vacancies. Check your result and cut-off marks now.
content:
UP Police Recruitment Board has announced the result for Constable (Civil Police) written examination held in January-February 2024. A total of 60244 vacancies are to be filled through this recruitment.

### Result Statistics
- Total Candidates Appeared: 17,32,453
- Total Vacancies: 60,244
- Qualified for Documentation: 2,45,678
- Overall Qualifying Percentage: 14.18%

### Category-wise Cut Off
- General: 287.50 marks
- OBC: 275.25 marks
- SC: 265.00 marks
- ST: 255.75 marks
- EWS: 280.50 marks

### How to Check Result
1. Visit official website: uppolice.gov.in
2. Click on Constable Result 2024 link
3. Enter Registration Number and Date of Birth
4. View and download result

### Next Stage
- Document Verification: March 2024
- Physical Standard Test (PST): April 2024
- Medical Examination: May 2024
- Final Result: June 2024

### Documents Required for DV
- Original mark sheets and certificates
- Caste certificate (if applicable)
- Domicile certificate
- Sports certificate (if applicable)

title: IBPS PO 2024 - CRP XIII Recruitment Notification
short_info: Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) has released CRP XIII for Probationary Officers/Management Trainees in participating banks. 4455 vacancies.
content:
IBPS conducts the Common Recruitment Process for selection of personnel in Probationary Officer/Management Trainees posts in 11 participating public sector banks.

### Participating Banks
- Canara Bank
- Indian Overseas Bank
- UCO Bank
- Bank of Baroda
- Bank of India
- And 6 more banks

### Vacancy Details
- Total Vacancies: 4455 posts
- Bank-wise vacancies available in notification

### Eligibility
- Age Limit: 20-30 years
- Qualification: Graduate in any discipline
- Computer Literacy: Working knowledge of computer systems
- Language Proficiency: Should be able to read/write/speak local language

### Selection Process
- Preliminary Exam (100 marks)
- Main Exam (200 marks)
- Interview (100 marks)

### Important Dates
- Online Registration: 1st August 2024 to 21st August 2024
- Prelim Exam: October 2024
- Main Exam: November 2024

### Fee
- General/OBC/EWS: ₹850
- SC/ST/PWD: ₹175

title: SBI PO 2024 Recruitment - 2000 Vacancies
short_info: State Bank of India (SBI) invites applications for Probationary Officers posts. Candidates can apply online from 15th September to 5th October 2024.
content:
State Bank of India, the largest public sector bank in India, has announced the recruitment of Probationary Officers in State Bank of India and its associate banks.

### Vacancy Breakup
- General: 810 posts
- OBC: 540 posts
- SC: 300 posts
- ST: 150 posts
- EWS: 200 posts
- Total: 2000 posts

### Eligibility Criteria
- Age Limit: 21-30 years (age relaxation as per rules)
- Qualification: Graduate in any discipline from recognized university
- Final year students can also apply provisionally

### Selection Procedure
- Phase I: Preliminary Examination (100 marks)
- Phase II: Main Examination (250 marks)
- Phase III: Psychometric Test, Interview & Group Exercises (50 marks)

### Important Dates
- Online Registration: 15.09.2024 to 05.10.2024
- Prelim Exam Date: November 2024
- Main Exam Date: December 2024

### Application Fee
- General/OBC/EWS: ₹750
- SC/ST/PWD: Nil

### Salary Package
- Starting Basic Pay: ₹41,960/-
- Total emoluments approx. ₹65,000/- per month
- Excellent career progression opportunities

title: CTET December 2024 - Online Application Started
short_info: Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) December 2024 online application has started. Last date to apply is 15th October 2024. Exam in December 2024.
content:
Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) conducts the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) for candidates aspiring to become teachers in government schools.

### Paper Details
- Paper I: For Primary Teachers (Classes 1-5)
- Paper II: For Elementary Teachers (Classes 6-8)
- Candidates can appear for either or both papers

### Eligibility
- Paper I: Senior Secondary with 50% + 2-year Diploma in Elementary Education OR Graduation with B.Ed
- Paper II: Graduation with B.Ed OR Senior Secondary with 50% + 4-year B.El.Ed
- Minimum 50% marks required in qualifying examination

### Exam Pattern
- Duration: 2.5 hours per paper
- Total Marks: 150 marks per paper
- Mode: Online (CBT)
- Languages: 20 languages including English and Hindi

### Application Fee
- Paper I or II only: ₹1000 (General), ₹600 (SC/ST/PWD)
- Both Papers: ₹1200 (General), ₹800 (SC/ST/PWD)

### Important Dates
- Application Start: 15th September 2024
- Application End: 15th October 2024
- Exam Date: 15th December 2024

### Certificate Validity
- CTET Certificate valid for lifetime
- Qualifying mark: 60% (90/150)
- No restrictions on number of attempts
